nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Piast was born about 1290, her father, Przemysł Piast, was 32 and her mother, Anna Piastówna, was 17. She had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec. She died about 1340, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Piast est née environ 1290, son père, Przemysł Piast, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anna Piastówna, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec. Elle est décédée environ 1340, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Piast um 1290 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Przemysł Piast 32 und ihre Mutter Anna Piastówna 17. Sie hatte mit Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1340 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Piast è nata il circa 1290, sua padre, Przemysł Piast, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Anna Piastówna, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec. Morì circa 1340, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Piastが約1290年に生まれた時，父Przemysł Piastは32歳，母Anna Piastównaは17歳であった。彼女はMikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovecとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1340年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Piast(이)가 대략 1290년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Przemysł Piast(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Piastówna(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1340년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

tany ho any amin'ny 1290–tany ho any amin'ny 1340

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Piast nasceu aproximadamente 1290, seu pai, Przemysł Piast, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anna Piastówna, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1340, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Piast родилась около 1290 г., её отцу по имени Przemysł Piast было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Piastówna, 17. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec. Она умерла около 1340 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

e tusa o le 1290–e tusa o le 1340

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Piast nació aproximadamente 1290, su papá, Przemysł Piast, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Anna Piastówna, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Mikuláš II. Opavský Přemyslovec. Murió aproximadamente 1340, a la edad de 52 años.
